home_h2_2:
More Than a Haircut.

          It's a Ritual.
home_p_16: At Gentleman's Chair, we believe personal grooming hygiene is an essential part of the modern gentleman's lifestyle. Every cut, shave, and beard trim is delivered with precision, passion, and purpose — a deliberate act of self-care that honours your time and your craft.
home_p_17: We've built a space where old-world craftsmanship meets quiet confidence. Pull up a chair. You're in good hands.
home_p_18: Classic cuts. Modern style. Always tailored to you — from timeless fades to sharp, sculpted shapes that define personal grooming at its finest.
home_p_19: Traditional hot towel shaves for the ultimate smooth finish. Ritual-grade grooming personal care — a ceremony, not just a service.
home_p_20: Shape, trim, and nourish. Because detail defines you. Expert beard sculpting and conditioning for the modern gentleman.
home_p_21: Premium products for hair, beard, and skin. Curated selections for personal grooming hygiene that elevate your daily ritual.
home_p_23: Experience the art of personal grooming in a space designed for gentlemen like you. Every visit is a ritual — precision, care, and craft.
home_p_24: The art of the perfect shave. Tradition, precision, and craft — delivered with old-world distinction.
terms_p_18:
Gentleman’s Chair provides grooming & personal care through the site. The services are subject to the terms 
            detailed in this document and may change from time to time.

terms_p_21:
Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, 
            consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.
terms_p_22:
All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Gentleman’s Chair. 
            Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.
terms_p_23:

            agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.
terms_p_24:
The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 
            30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.
terms_p_25:
The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. 
            In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.
terms_p_26:

            local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.

accessibility_p_12:
Gentleman’s Chair is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement 
            the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.
accessibility_p_13:
We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services 
            independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on 
            accessibility for people with disabilities.
accessibility_p_14: The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:
accessibility_p_15: The website has been tested using:
accessibility_p_16:
We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according 
            to technological developments and user feedback.
accessibility_p_17: If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:
accessibility_p_18: Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.
